name: banderx
vendor: PyPA (Python Packaging Authority); part of the bandersnatch project
language: nginx configuration + Dockerfile (no application code); the mirror tree it serves is generated by bandersnatch, written in Python
first_released: 2022 (approx.; ships inside the bandersnatch repo, not released independently)
last_updated: 2026 (tracks bandersnatch 7.1.0, released 2026-02-01; latest release as of 2026-06-18)
perf_notes: Pure nginx static-file serving: very high throughput, low latency, minimal memory, no application tier. Config uses sendfile, tcp_nopush/tcp_nodelay, keepalive 69s, worker_connections 2048, worker_processes auto. Serving cost is bounded by nginx/disk/CDN, not by banderx; the (separate) mirror-build cost belongs to bandersnatch's multi-worker sync.
scale_notes: Stateless read-only nginx over a bind-mounted /data/pypi/web tree, so it scales horizontally behind a load balancer/CDN with a shared or replicated filesystem. No built-in HA/clustering, health endpoint, or metrics; rely on standard nginx/LB/CDN patterns. S3-backed bandersnatch mirrors are typically fronted by CloudFront/another CDN rather than banderx.
summary: A minimal nginx Docker image bundled with bandersnatch that serves a bandersnatch-generated static PyPI mirror (PEP 503 HTML + PEP 691/700 JSON, Accept-negotiated) read-only over HTTP, with no app, auth, or database.
extras: Accept-header content negotiation in nginx between PEP 503 HTML (.html), PEP 691 JSON (application/vnd.pypi.simple.v1+json -> .v1_json) and v1+html (.v1_html) via a map directive plus a per-location types block
autoindex on -> directory browsing of the mirror tree
serves optional legacy per-package JSON at /json/ and /pypi/ as application/json (populated when bandersnatch json=true)
ships read-only by design: no upload, no auth, no database, no admin endpoints
README documents optional self-signed HTTPS (openssl genrsa/req/x509) with a commented TLS server block; default is HTTP :80 only
build-your-own Docker image (docker build --tag banderx src/banderx); expects the bandersnatch web/ tree bind-mounted at /data/pypi/web; no official published banderx image (unlike pypa/bandersnatch)
logs to stdout/stderr (container-friendly) using nginx 'main' combined-style access log
all standard install clients (pip, uv, Poetry, PDM, Hatch, Flit, Pipenv) resolve from the served standard PEP 503/691 simple index; twine/upload is unsupported because banderx is read-only

the bandersnatch generator (not banderx) emits PEP 691/700 JSON with api-version 1.1 (versions list, per-file size and upload-time) and the yanked field, and PEP 629 HTML repository-version 1.0, but does NOT mirror PEP 658/714 core-metadata files (issue #1124 still open) or PEP 740 attestations

the bandersnatch generator provides full PyPI sync, allowlist/blocklist filter plugins, sha256 verification, keep_index_versions, diff-file, and an S3 storage backend (swift removed in 7.0.0; no GCS/Azure)
